authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
USDA Forest Service — Lake Tahoe Basin Management Unit

sources.title: CCR T14 §5.85(a)(1) — Trout, General Statewide Regulations (inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40 — Alphabetical List of Hatchery Trout, Hatchery Steelhead, and Salmon Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Sawmill Pond not listed)
CCR T14 §7.50 — Alphabetical List of Trout Waters with Special Fishing Regulations (Sawmill Pond not listed)
2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (Updated 06/01/2026)
sources.quotedText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and 10 trout possession limit.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: Sawmill Pond Picnic Area — Lake Tahoe Basin Management Unit, USDA Forest Service
sources.quotedText: Sawmill Pond is a stocked fishing area for children 14 years of age and under. Adults are allowed to help children fish but not allowed to fish themselves. The pond is located approximately one mile south of South Lake Tahoe along Lake Tahoe Boulevard.

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R2 El Dorado Sawmill Pond Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take May-September; R2 El Dorado Sawmill Pond Lahontan Cutthroat Trout Super-catchable Put and Take May-September

sources.title: Lahontan Cutthroat Trout | California Department of Fish and Wildlife
sources.quotedText: In California, the historic range of Lahontan cutthroat trout includes Lake Tahoe and the Carson, Truckee, and Walker river basins.

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Reservoir/Pond layer record for gaz_id 275028, "Sawmill Pond", Reservoir, El Dorado County, CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":275028,"gaz_name":"Sawmill Pond","gaz_featureclass":"Reservoir","fcode":39004,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"El Dorado"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13361228.2337, 4705806.2409) converts to lon -120.025955, lat 38.889154, matching the file's recorded coordinate (-120.0259, 38.8893) to within ~20m.

parameters.note: Sawmill Pond is not listed in CCR §7.40(b) or §7.50(b), so it falls under the general statewide regulation for inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds in §5.85(a)(1).

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year (general statewide regulation for lakes, reservoirs, and ponds; not listed as a special-regulation water)
regulations.verbatimText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

parameters.counting_rule: General statewide trout limit for inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds: five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag limit, 10 trout possession limit
regulations.verbatimText: All inland lakes, reservoirs, and ponds, including those on private lands, are open to fishing all year with a five-trout daily bag limit and ten-trout possession limit.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. In practice this pond is managed as a youth-only fishing area for children 14 and under (see the USFS access rule), so anglers there are below the license age.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.description: Sawmill Pond is managed by the USDA Forest Service (Lake Tahoe Basin Management Unit) as a stocked youth fishing area: only children 14 years of age and under may fish, and adults may help children fish but may not fish themselves.

raw.adults: may assist children but may not fish

regulations.citation: USFS LTBMU — Sawmill Pond Picnic Area
regulations.humanSummary: Youth fishing area: only children 14 and under may fish; adults may help but may not fish themselves
regulations.verbatimText: Sawmill Pond is a stocked fishing area for children 14 years of age and under. Adults are allowed to help children fish but not allowed to fish themselves.

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Sawmill Pond (Region 2, El Dorado Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of May-September. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Sawmill Pond (Region 2, El Dorado Co.) for super-catchable-size Lahontan Cutthroat Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of May-September. In the PDF table this row's species and size cells wrap across a page break; the row was verified directly against the document. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.
